title: Speeny Skull
description: A resource pack to make the Burning Skull painting spin. With apologies(?) to Kristoph Zetterstrand.
body:
Takes the spinning version of the Burning Skull painting [posted by Kristoph Zetterstrand](https://twitter.com/Zetterstrand/status/1635735274247389201) and replaces the Burning Skull painting with it. That's really all there is to it.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/f2cgw8emYjc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
